events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a crew using a field method for GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting that is "less tidy" than the preferred shop approach but still matches listed product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 210.12.

This is a pass situation. The method matches product instructions and project requirements, no local amendments forbid it, and it aligns with NEC 210.8 (GFCI) and 210.12 (AFCI). The work is in-progress.
